rationale: The citing paper mentions Belei et al. (2012) mainly as part of grouped background citations on taste-versus-health tradeoffs and healthful indulgences. It uses that stream to set up contrast for its own contribution (food energy and financial dissatisfaction), rather than building specific hypotheses, mechanisms, measures, or analyses from Belei et al. The cited work does not appear to have a distinct functional role beyond general literature positioning.
